title: Manufacturing Engineer - Procter & Gamble India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Procter & Gamble India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
